revision.text: [[User:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|''Example''}}}}}}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|talk]]{{int:dot-separator}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|contribs]]{{int:dot-separator}}[[Special:DeletedContributions/{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|deleted]]{{int:dot-separator}}{{Edit count link|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example User}}}}}}}}|linklabel=count}}{{int:dot-separator}}{{AfD count link|{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|linklabel=AfD}}{{int:dot-separator}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} logs]{{int:dot-separator}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log]{{int:dot-separator}}[{{fullurl:Special:Listusers|limit=1&username={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} lu]{{int:dot-separator}}[[Wikipedia:Requests for arbitration/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|rfar]]{{int:dot-separator}}[[Wikipedia:Sockpuppet investigations/{{Encodefirst|{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|spi]]) {{Documentation|Template:User/doc}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
